creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
It looks like there were some more problems with the previous patch I've
posted; for some reason, Git 1.5.2 hardcodes the CC, CFLAGS, etc. I've
stored the latest version of my patch online, so I don't have to mail
around each time I fix a silly typo:

	http://g-rave.nl/junk/freebsd-ports-devel-git.diff

This patch also adds a NOPORTDOCS flags to force the manual pages not to
be generated and installed. On my Sun U10 this just takes too long to be
useful.

-- 
 Ed Schouten <ed@fxq.nl>
 WWW: http://g-rave.nl/
